title: Best Coffee Brands in Italy
excerpt: Italian coffee brands remain dominant in global espresso culture.
content:
Italy remains one of the most influential countries in global coffee culture.

Brands like Lavazza and Illy helped define espresso worldwide.

title: Why Japanese Coffee Culture Is Exploding
excerpt: Japan has become one of the most advanced specialty coffee markets.
content: Japanese coffee culture blends precision, aesthetics, and specialty roasting.
